releaseNotes: Quick fix on top of v2.17.0: morning notification "you have N calendar events today" no longer counts recurring events that occur on an earlier day of the same week. The receiver was passing the raw query result through, instead of expanding each recurring event's rule against today — so a weekly Tuesday event was being counted on Wed/Thu/Fri mornings too. Same fix applied to the boot-time reminder rescheduler so per-occurrence reminders for recurring events register correctly after a reboot.
